a sa^hata Aha\vezu^#} <ls n="ṚV.">6,47,1.</ls> <ls n="ṚV.">10,150,5.</ls> <ls>M. 5,95.</ls> <ls n="M. 5,">98.</ls> <ls n="M.">7,89.</ls> <ls n="M.">11,119.</ls> <ls>BHAG. 1,31.</ls> <ls>ARJ. 10,67.</ls> <ls>R. 1,1,68.</ls> <ls n="R. 1,1,">79.</ls> <ls n="R. 1,">23,9.</ls> <ls>SUŚR. 1,7,18. 12,11.</ls> <ls>MBH. 14,1791.</ls> {#citrasenena cAhavaH#} <ls n="MBH. 14,">324.</ls> {#na BAtyayaM mamAvAso hataDvaja ivAhavaH#} <ls>R. 3,68,27.</ls> {#AhavaSoBin#} <ls>MBH. 3,15260.</ls> {#evaMviDenAhavacezwitena#} <ls>RAGH. 7,64.</ls> {#mahAhava#} <ls>MBH. 14,1772.</ls> <ls>ARJ. 8,2.</ls> Vgl. {#anuhava, parihava#} . <div n="1">— 2) (von {#hu#} mit {#A#}) {%Opfer%} <ls>TRIK.</ls> <ls>H. an.</ls> <ls>MED.</ls> <LEND>
